cards.title: Policy Rules & Timelines
cards.content:
• Free Look Period (Cooling-off)
• Grace Period (Timelines by Mode)
• Lapse and Revival
• Standard Parts of a Policy Document

cards.title: 1. Parts of Document
cards.content:
Preamble: Intro of parties.
Operative Clause: The heart of the promise.
Policy Schedule: PERSONALIZED details (Name, Age, Sum Assured, Nominee).

cards.title: 2. Free Look Period
cards.content: Trial period of 15 days from receipt. Can return policy for full refund (minus stamp duty/medical/mortality charges).

cards.title: 3. Grace Period Rules
cards.content:
Monthly Mode: 15 Days.
Quarterly/Half-Yearly/Yearly: 30 Days.
Note: Claim is PAID if death occurs during grace period.

cards.title: 4. Reinstatement
cards.content: Policy lapses after grace period. Revival requires paying arrears + interest + declaration of good health.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: Death during grace period: Claim paid minus due premium.

cards.title: Q2. Grace period for yearly premium?
